overview.problem: Local main diverged from origin/upstream_main and needed the upstream application changes while preserving the local harness workflow docs.
overview.target_behavior: main contains origin/upstream_main, OpenClaw/QClaw/Cursor SDK/WorkBuddy provider routes are removed per user request, local harness docs are current, and verification evidence is recorded.

in_scope: Resolve merge conflicts in application, prompt, test, and harness documentation files.
Remove OpenClaw/QClaw provider auto-configuration, relay, fallback, and tests.
Remove Cursor SDK provider route, dependency, client, and tests.
Remove WorkBuddy provider auto-configuration, fallback, and tests.
Update ARCHITECTURE.md and SESSION_HANDOFF.md with the resulting boundaries and verification evidence.
out_of_scope: New feature development beyond merge reconciliation and requested provider cleanup.
Live provider, broker, or credential-dependent behavior.

external_systems: None required for the baseline merge and provider cleanup.

steps.description: Inspect current branch state and divergence from origin/upstream_main.

expected_changes: Application updates from origin/upstream_main are present on main.
Local harness docs and workflow files are preserved or updated as needed.

steps.description: Remove requested provider SDK/agent integrations, run verification, and update durable artifacts.
expected_changes: OpenClaw/QClaw, Cursor SDK, and WorkBuddy provider integrations are removed.
ARCHITECTURE.md records the explicit OpenAI-compatible HTTP provider boundary.
SESSION_HANDOFF.md records merge result, verification, skipped checks, and restart notes.
This plan is moved to docs/plan/completed/.
verification: .venv/bin/python -m py_compile pa_agent/app_context.py pa_agent/ai/deepseek_client.py pa_agent/ai/mimo_compat.py pa_agent/ai/prompt_assembler.py pa_agent/ai/provider_errors.py pa_agent/ai/stage2_normalizer.py pa_agent/gui/ai_model_settings_dialog.py pa_agent/gui/settings_dialog.py pa_agent/gui/main_window.py pa_agent/orchestrator/two_stage.py

QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/unit/test_deepseek_client.py tests/unit/test_kv_prefix_cache.py tests/unit/test_prompt_assembler.py tests/unit/test_provider_errors.py tests/unit/test_settings_round_trip.py -q

required: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/unit/test_deepseek_client.py tests/unit/test_kv_prefix_cache.py tests/unit/test_prompt_assembler.py tests/unit/test_provider_errors.py tests/unit/test_settings_round_trip.py -q

skipped.reason: Focused tests covered touched provider, prompt, and settings surfaces; full suite was broader than required for this merge cleanup.
skipped.follow_up: Run before making full unit/property tests a release gate.

skipped.reason: Not required for this merge cleanup.
Integration/e2e/live checks need suitable local display, services, or credentials and were outside this merge cleanup.
skipped.follow_up: Run in an environment with the required local services and credentials.

commands_run: rg -n "qclaw|QClaw|OpenClaw|openclaw|cursor-sdk|cursor_sdk|CursorSdk|WorkBuddy|workbuddy|openclaw_cs|openclaw_wb|claw" pa_agent tests config README.md ARCHITECTURE.md SESSION_HANDOFF.md docs/plan pyproject.toml

.venv/bin/python -m py_compile pa_agent/app_context.py pa_agent/ai/deepseek_client.py pa_agent/ai/mimo_compat.py pa_agent/ai/prompt_assembler.py pa_agent/ai/provider_errors.py pa_agent/ai/stage2_normalizer.py pa_agent/gui/ai_model_settings_dialog.py pa_agent/gui/settings_dialog.py pa_agent/gui/main_window.py pa_agent/orchestrator/two_stage.py

QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/unit/test_deepseek_client.py tests/unit/test_kv_prefix_cache.py tests/unit/test_prompt_assembler.py tests/unit/test_provider_errors.py tests/unit/test_settings_round_trip.py -q

progress_log.entry: Created active plan after confirming main and origin/upstream_main diverged.
Merged origin/upstream_main and resolved four content conflicts.
Removed requested OpenClaw/QClaw, Cursor SDK, and WorkBuddy provider integrations and updated docs.

completion.summary: origin/upstream_main was merged into main, conflicts were resolved, provider SDK/agent integrations were removed, and focused verification plus the harness passed.
follow_up: Run full RUN_TESTS=1 and RUN_LINT=1 checks when broader release gating is needed.
